honesty: DINOv2 features are frozen self-supervised (no labels). PCA fit on TRAIN fold only. At n=211 the embedding model is a calibration scaffold; the lift over tabular is reported honestly (lift_rho). The big win needs the corpus manifold + more true labels + per-second curves.
